signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026 Polling Underway in Single Phase on April 9, No Results or Major Announcements Yet | NO |
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Elections 2026 Polling Underway in Single Phase on April 9, No Results or Major Announcements Yet | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Polling began at 7 AM on April 9, 2026, across 140 constituencies with over 2.7 crore voters participating in a three-cornered contest between LDF (ruling, seeking third term), UDF (aiming for comeback), and BJP-led NDA [1][2][3]. Early turnout reach
